title: Regional officials meet after maritime warning
description: Synthetic article used to demonstrate the GeoEventGraph normalized article schema.
text: Iran warned it could restrict traffic near the Strait of Hormuz. United States officials said they were negotiating with Oman to reduce tensions.
paragraphs: Iran warned it could restrict traffic near the Strait of Hormuz.
United States officials said they were negotiating with Oman to reduce tensions.

title: Security council reviews drone incident
description: Synthetic article used to demonstrate relation extraction and graph aggregation.
text: Israel said a drone unit attacked a military site near Eilat. The United States supported Israel with additional air defence equipment.
paragraphs: Israel said a drone unit attacked a military site near Eilat.
The United States supported Israel with additional air defence equipment.
